'''Ela Sivel''' was a [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Artist/Legends|artist]]. [[Gender/Legends|She]] was arrested by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during their [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. She eventually participated in a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] break along with some captured [[Agent/Legends|agents]] of the [[Naboo Underground]]. She appeared to be generally pessimistic about the entire situation.<ref name="Theed Adventure Game" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game|''Star Wars: Invasion of Theed'' Adventure Game]] {{1st}}
